title: sphaeralcea subhastata var. pumila
intro: Sphaeralcea subhastata var. pumila, also known as dwarf globemallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea subhastata var. pumila include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
